title: Apple & Blueberry Quaker Oats With Almond Butter & Banana
summary: Creamy Apple and Blueberry Quaker Oats rippled with blueberry compote, topped with banana, almond butter, fresh blueberries and almonds for the ultimate bowl of oats!

ingredients.label: 4 x Apple & Blueberry Quaker Oats Sachets
ingredients.name: Apple & Blueberry Quaker Oats Sachet

method.description: For the blueberry compote, add 100g blueberries, the zest and juice of a lemon and maple syrup to a saucepan. Simmer on medium heat for 5 mins until jammy.
In a separate pan add your Apple & Blueberry Quaker Oats sachets along with the milk, simmer for 2 mins or until the milk is absorbed, stirring occasionally.
Slice the bananas and roughly chop almonds.

Distribute the Quaker Oats between bowls, swirl through a tbsp of the blueberry compote, top with the sliced banana, a drizzle of almond butter, finish with a scattering of roughly chopped almonds and the remaining fresh blueberries.

chefs.name: Ben Lippett
chefs.summary: Ben Lippett (@dinnerbyben) is a cook, food writer, recipe developer, and co-founder of Dr Sting's Hot Honey. Ben spent years working at a spate of restaurants in the UK and Australia – including a brief but rewarding stint at a butcher's – before making the leap to food media.
